productDisplayName: Maxima Attivo Men Black Dial Watch
description: Case style: Analog watch with a stainless steel round case Dial style: Black dial with silver hands Strap style: Black textured strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour mark, date aperture on the 3 hour mark, fixed bezel with markings on it and screw to reset time Water resistance upto 30 metres Guarantee: 1 year
